description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Add a Den admin backoffice dashboard for internal support and worker operations.
- Polish the Den worker experience with clearer overview CTAs, a light-mode activity panel, and enterprise contact capture wired into Loops.
Fixes & polish
- Move runtime status into Advanced settings for a cleaner default settings view.
- Improve skill sharing and hot-reload reliability in the desktop app.
- Refresh app icon styling and related branding assets.
Packaging / ops
- Bump OpenWork packages to 0.11.145 and refresh AUR packaging metadata.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.144...v0.11.145
